\newpage

\phantomsection
\section*{Bibliographie}

\printbibliography[filter=ouvrages, heading=subbibliography, title={Ouvrages}]

\printbibliography[filter=articlesScientifiques, heading=subbibliography, title={Articles scientifiques}]

\printbibliography[filter=articlesPresse, heading=subbibliography, title={Articles de presse et sources médiatiques}]

\printbibliography[filter=ressourcesEnLigne, heading=subbibliography, title={Sources audiovisuelles et ressources en ligne}]

\renewcommand{\printbibliography}[1][]{}
